title: stylocoryna sambucina
intro: Stylocoryna sambucina, also known as elderberry, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Adoxaceae family. Traditionally, the plant's berries and flowers have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, including antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stylocoryna sambucina include reducing the severity of cold and flu symptoms, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, as well as used in jams and wines, to harness its medicinal and nutritional benefits.
